programmes.show_description: Secrets Of Mackinac. Jess and Phil are joined by The Ghost Brothers as they continue to investigate Mackinac Island's mysteries. They explore a lighthouse with a dark past. S4, Ep2
Niagara Nightmare. Jess and Phil dive into the mysteries of Niagara Falls and its history of violent deaths. They investigate reports of disturbing paranormal activity. S4, Ep3
Witches Of Mexico. Phil and Jess travel to Monterrey, Mexico, where locals have encountered witches and black magic. They discover dark spells, blood rituals and animal sacrifice. S4, Ep4

Teleshopping.
Guns a-Blazin'. The baggage battlers head to a cowboy auction in California, where they duel over items dating back to the legendary Buffalo Bill and the Barnum & Bailey circuses. S3, Ep8
Platinum Hits. The baggage battlers head to a music icons auction in New York. They find a gold disc for the Pink Floyd album 'Dark Side Of The Moon' and a nude photo of Madonna. S3, Ep9
Big Cold Gold. Shawn's million-dollar Bluff claim is denied, leaving the grounds open to anyone. Kris Kelly leaps at the chance, dragging his family across 70 miles of frozen tundra. S6, Ep11
Cold War. Shawn and Kris face off when the Kelly family invades Shawn's turf. Emily hits the ice with a crew of veteran miners in a bid to reclaim her hotspot at Hasting's Creek. S6, Ep12
The Poseidon Crew face a devastating financial disaster after permit delays. The Victoria Diggers are still awaiting approval to dig German Gully. S5, Ep2
Ivory-Billed Woodpecker. Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists in the alligator and snake infested swamps of Louisiana. S2, Ep1
Turf War. On the Blue grounds, a captain's bet has the boats jockeying for position, while on the Red grounds, a returning veteran proves his worth. S8, Ep2
Weak Links. The Bering Sea exposes soft spots and weak links in each crew. While the skippers wonder which deckhands have the right stuff, the Time Bandit says goodbye to a crewmate. S8, Ep3
Hell And High Water. Ben is running out of food, but sudden snow gives hope of tracking wild game, while a promising dig site prompts Boyce to haul in his mining equipment. S1, Ep2
Corsica's Nazi Treasure. Josh hunts for the treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. S3, Ep14
Italy's Barbarian Booty. Josh travels to Italy in search of what may be history's richest treasure - the looted relics of the Roman Empire interred with the Visigoth king Alaric. S3, Ep15
Sweet Homestead Alabama. For families moving entirely off-grid, the learning curve is steep. To save their homesteads, they call in survival experts to prepare them for the worst. S4, Ep3
The Foreign Claim. Isaac from the Opal Whisperers works an abandoned, dangerous mine. The Mooka Boys are confronted by an irate miner as they peg a claim too close to his mine. S6, Ep16
A Barrel Full Of Nuts. The Bushmen's drill rig loses a vital pin, forcing 74-year-old Les to undertake repairs four meters in the air. The Digi Diggers flooded mine wall collapses. S6, Ep17
Man Down. The perilous Bering Sea is wreaking havoc. Sean is set to collide with another boat, two deckhands get taken down on the Wizard, and Jake almost loses a deckhand, twice. S13, Ep16
Hillstrand's Last Catch. Two old friends race to finish their seasons. Johnathan Hillstrand wants to bid farewell in a blaze of glory, but the Bering Sea may have other plans. S13, Ep17
Burning Inside Out. Ylena's neck painfully dislocates at the slightest movement. Kayla has an extremely rare and painful condition where her arm burns on the inside. S6, Ep1

programmes.show_name: My Body Is Eating My Bones Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: My Body Is Eating My Bones. Ignacia suffers from a facial tumour that could asphyxiate her. Thomas has a rare bone eating disease that has ruined the left side of his torso. S6, Ep2
The Poseidon Crew are running out of time to find a 1,000-ounce nugget. The Gold Retrievers work through the night in an attempt to escape dangerous summer heat. S7, Ep16
Alone: Lonely Like The Wolf. In the Bulgarian mountains, wolves and boars stalk all-star survivalist EJ Synder. Alone and without fire, he is an easy target for predators. S1, Ep7
Survive Or Ky Tryin. All-star survivalist Ky struggles in the Amazon rainforest. He faces swarms of mosquitos, blood-thirsty piranhas and caiman-filled waters. S1, Ep8

Greek Revival Farmhouse. The team preserves a Greek revival farmhouse in Bentleyville. Main salvage items include mantels, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop. S6, Ep2
Vaughan Furniture Company. The team heads to the Vaughan Furniture Company. Mike and Ted struggle to salvage a furniture press while Robert is slowed down by explosion-proof lights. S6, Ep3
Tunnel Vision. Shawn gambles on a risky move. Kris suffers a life-threatening air-line freeze up, whilst Zeke attempts the most dangerous dive of his life through 20-ft of ice. S6, Ep13
Three's Company. Sean continues his search for the boulder that marks the gold patch he found last summer. In need of a new plan, Emily asks Sean for permission to dredge the Bluff. S6, Ep14
The Dust Devil's entire operation is forced to shut down as The Poseidon Crew's dig zone floods. Every team is desperate to reach their targets. S5, Ep3
Dwarf Hippo. The Malagasy dwarf hippo has been presumed extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist trek through Madagascar to prove it survives. S2, Ep2
The Hook. Halfway through the King crab gauntlet, the crews must dig deep to get over the midseason hump. The skippers give their youngest deckhands a choice: step up or step off. S8, Ep4
Alien Abduction. Both man and machine are showing signs of wear. The Ramblin' Rose struggles with engine failures, while The Wizard's greenhorn grapples with doubts. S8, Ep5
Wasting Away. Boyce takes a risk crossing a river to reach rich ground, whilst Ben rappels down a cliff. 68 year-old mining veteran John Belcik starts his descent into the Canyon. S1, Ep3
India's Atlantis. Josh travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. He dives into the Arabian Sea to visit a dig site that could rewrite history. S3, Ep16
The Secret. Adventurer and avid explorer, Josh Gates, travels all over America to investigate the mystery of the 1980s bestseller and cult phenomenon, The Secret. S4, Ep1
Mississippi Mayhem. In Mississippi, the Raneys must first solve the mystery of flooding water before teaching a family of six to thrive off-grid together. S4, Ep4
High Goals. The Bushmen struggle to locate the source of water flooding their mine. The Misfits are forced to work Issy's mine Honey Hole as they wait for bulldozer repairs. S6, Ep18
From The Last Hole. The Bushmen bring in a master opal cutter, hoping to transform rough stones into a $100,000 haul. Sofia and Isaac are threatened by a mine roof collapse. S6, Ep19
Lost At Sea. The Coast Guard scours the Bering Sea for a missing crab vessel, while the fleet awaits news on fate of its crew. After a plea from his wife, Sig ponders an early exit. S13, Ep18
Last Damn Arctic Storm. After the Destination tragedy one last storm hits Edgar, Bill, Sean and Jake. The Coast Guard fear the worst for another fishing vessel as it takes on water. S13, Ep19
Under-Mined. Ice sets in early, threatening to freeze the operation. In a desperate search for unfrozen ground, Andy creates a novel solution: digging up the road. S2, Ep11
Blow The Man Down. Mother Nature blows back as Landon embarks on his first solo mission. Sig fishes in 20-foot seas as ferocious tides endanger John's crewmen. S20, Ep11
